description_long: This is a realistic bust sculpture of an older man with a bald head, prominent mustache, and stern facial expression. The bust is mounted on a rectangular pedestal with an inscription on the front, and the sculpture appears to be made of stone or concrete. The facial features are highly detailed, with deep-set eyes, defined cheekbones, and a pronounced brow. The back of the bust is smoothly finished, with the shoulders and upper chest rendered in a simplified, blocky form. The base is solid and slightly wider than the bust itself, providing stability. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or memorial function, likely intended for public display.
description: A detailed stone bust of an older man with a mustache, mounted on a rectangular pedestal with an inscription. The sculpture features realistic facial details and a solid, blocky base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, mustache, and the inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the smooth transition to the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and neck, with the blocky back of the bust and pedestal visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the clean lines of the bust's back.
attribute_subject_matter: human bust of an older man
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
